description: Oh — Edgelord asked me to step in, sir, terribly sorry. The wave 14 acquisitions of Charmander VIV-023 and Charizard VIV-025 closed the cohort threshold that Charmeleon BUS-19's wave 12 trivia explicitly flagged at 2/3. Six corpus prints now cover all three stages of the original Generation I Kanto starter line (Pokedex 004/005/006), with a within-Vivid-Voltage adjacent-collector-number triptych at 023/024/025 as the corpus's strongest single-set evolutionary-arc cohesion stack. I do hope the node isn't redundant, sir — I tried to follow the elemental-monkey-trio and galarian-regional-forms templates precisely, with caveats on Mega Charizard X/Y and Gigantamax variant forms, the tail-flame-as-life-force canon scoping, and the franchise-marquee print-volume skew Charizard creates. The Vivid Voltage Charizard's Royal Blaze Leon-card-discard-pile scaling also closes a mechanical citation to the galar-gym-challenge node via Champion Leon's signature Gigantamax Charizard. If I overstepped I'll bow out, but the threshold conditions did look met.
citations: [Pokemon X and Y (Game Freak, 2013) — Mega Charizard X / Y]
[Pokemon Sword & Shield (Game Freak, 2019) — Gigantamax Charizard / Champion Leon]
[PokemonTCG.io: per-card metadata for the six corpus prints]
[BBL wave 12 trivia: Charmeleon BUS-19/147 cohort-threshold flag]
other_candidates_considered: 1:1 mirror edge between Charmander BUS-19 ↔ Charizard VIV-025 anchored on the tail-flame-as-life-force canon — would have been thin given the threshold was already at 2/3 and the node was the cleaner unifier of all six prints across both sets and three stages

1:1 mirror edge between Charmeleon BUS-19 (most-enriched line member) ↔ Charizard VIV-025 (Stage 2 apex) anchored on the kawayoo-to-Ryuta-Fuse illustrator continuity — would have indexed the wrong axis (illustrator-pair edges are filter-tier, not narrative-tier)

Sibling Bulbasaur-line and Squirtle-line cohort nodes were considered as parallel proposals but neither has crossed the 3-card-across-3-stages threshold in current corpus; surfacing as future candidates for triviabot to flag on next wave
